name: Pigtail TS9 / SMA Female 15cm
title: Pigtail TS9 / SMA Female 15cm
short_description: Suitable for Huawei and other 3G/4G LTE modems
description: The Pigtail TS9 / SMA Female 15cm (P-T9-SF-15) is designed to provide a stable and efficient connection between devices with TS9 connectors and external antennas or equipment using SMA interfaces. TS9 connectors are commonly found in LTE/4G/5G USB modems, portable routers, and mobile hotspots, while SMA connectors are widely used in high-performance external antennas for cellular, Wi-Fi, and GPS applications. This pigtail is an excellent solution for boosting wireless signal strength by enabling the use of external antennas with your modem, router, or hotspot. With a compact length of 15 cm, it ensures minimal signal loss while offering flexibility for installation in tight spaces.

detailed_description.heading: Connection Between TS9 and SMA Interfaces
detailed_description.text: The Pigtail TS9 / SMA Female 15cm (P-T9-SF-15) is designed to provide a stable and efficient connection between devices with TS9 connectors and external antennas or equipment using SMA interfaces. TS9 connectors are commonly found in LTE/4G/5G USB modems, portable routers, and mobile hotspots, while SMA connectors are widely used in high-performance external antennas for cellular, Wi-Fi, and GPS applications. This pigtail is an excellent solution for boosting wireless signal strength by enabling the use of external antennas with your modem, router, or hotspot. With a compact length of 15 cm, it ensures minimal signal loss while offering flexibility for installation in tight spaces.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Accessory for Networking and RF Equipment
detailed_description.text: The P-T9-SF-15 is a versatile accessory that expands the compatibility of your networking and RF equipment. By enabling connections to high-gain or specialized external antennas, it helps enhance both signal reception and transmission for Wi-Fi, LTE, and other RF applications. This improvement in coverage and network stability makes it especially useful for wireless routers, mobile hotspots, LTE modems, and custom projects. Its compact design ensures flexibility during installation while minimizing signal loss, providing dependable performance in a variety of scenarios. Whether you need better coverage at home, stronger connectivity for office use, or a reliable solution for professional setups, this pigtail offers a simple and effective way to upgrade your system.

comments.name: Viesuls
comments.text: It functions OK. Only wish the cable would be softer.
